title: cases.yaml
description: YAML root sequence (JSON-compatible array) of row objects at dataset/{dataset}/[{category}/…]/cases.yaml. Row `input` / `expected` validate against `input.schema.json` and `expected.schema.json`.

id.description: Stable record id (UUID). Used to upsert by id. Omit to let Braintrust assign one.

input.description: The case input handed to the evaluation task (generated from mongodb-mcp-server eval types).

expected.description: The expected result / grading criteria for this case.

metadata.description: Per-case taxonomy metadata and Braintrust row metadata.

origin.description: Braintrust provenance info linking back to a source object.
